conservative.name: Prey's Scent
conservative.requirements: 3 favour, Strength 3+. You cannot follow any trail older than 1 week

success.description: You pick up your quarry's scent and gain a clear impression of the direction be has gone

As above, and until the next moonrise, you keep a memory of the subject's scent. You add to the dice pool to further attempts to find or follow your quarry. (You can only hold one quarry's scent at a time)

boon.description: You learn a piece of information about your quarry that can be conveyed through scent, such as his race or gender, how recently he passed by, or whether he was wounded or ill

challenge.description: Special: If the trail you are following is more than a day old, add to the dice pool

reckless.name: Prey's Scent
reckless.requirements: 3 favour, Strength 3+. You cannot follow any trail older than 1 week

success.description: You pick up your quarry's scent and gain a clear impression of the direction be has gone

As above, and until the next moonrise, you keep a memory of the subject's scent. You add to the dice pool to further attempts to find or follow your quarry. (You can only hold one quarry's scent at a time)

boon.description: If and when you catch up to your quarry, you gain the Invigorated condition for 2 rounds

challenge.description: Special: If the trail you are following is more than a day old, add to the dice pool
